creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Reporter Could you please:

1) Confirm uname -a output
2) Confirm what version crashes, was it the official wireguard package? 
2.1) if the official package, provide the `pkg info` output for that package (as an attachment)
3) Include any error messages or a screenshot of the crash as it appears to you on the console, or in /var/log/messages or elsewhere.
4) confirm when the crash occurs? is the crash reproducible starting wireguard manually?
5)
